『Summery』

Ray is a pretty lonely guy; ever since he was a child, he’s wanted a puppy, but his work life just never seemed fit for a cute puppy companion. That’s until tonight, where you ended up getting wasted at a work party and he had to take you home (seeing that he was the only one not drunk).  But you being with him tonight was fate (you just didn’t know it); you were meant to be his new puppy, and once you’d become sober and accustomed to being with him, you’d finally just realize how well he can treat you.
